redstone_pearl.title: Process Redstone Pearls (Create Teleporters step 1 — requires Ender Pearls + Redstone in Create processing)

quantum_fluid.title: Process Quantum Fluid (Create Teleporters step 2 — Redstone Pearl processed into liquid form)

subtitle.text: The Redstone Pearl bridges two states: matter and transmission. That is what teleportation is.

description: The Quantum Mechanism chain begins with the Redstone Pearl.
Ender Pearls + Redstone combined in Create processing (mixing/compacting).
The Redstone Pearl is the quantum-stable form of the Ender Pearl.
It retains teleportation properties but can be processed further.
You need at least 4 for the full quantum chain.
The Redstone Pearl is processed into Quantum Fluid using Create fluid systems.
A Fluid Tank and Mechanical Press or similar Create machine is required.
The Quantum Fluid is stored in tanks for downstream processing.
Your Ender Pearl stockpile from Ch13-14 feeds this chain.
64 pearls minimum recommended for a full teleporter installation.
